message:
fix(demo_showcase): add clippy::too_many_lines allows

Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to functions that exceed 100 lines:
- run_headless_smoke
- draw_pass_toasts
- draw_pass_debug

These functions are intentionally long as they handle complex rendering
logic with multiple subsections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
